title: Flow Icons for Zed - Configuration
description: Customize how Flow Icons renders in Zed. After editing, run `node update-icons.cjs` to rebuild the icon theme and restart Zed.

border.description: Optional border outline color. Defaults to `contrast` (which itself defaults to `white` in dark mode, `black` in light mode).

contrast.description: Optional contrast color. Defaults to `white` in dark mode, `black` in light mode.

borderOpacity.description: Border opacity (0-1). Set to 0 to hide borders entirely.

folderColor.description: Default folder color. Each palette ships a matching folder_<color>{,_open}.svg used for unnamed directories.

specificFolders.description: If false, all directories use the default folder icon (no per-name folder icons like `src`, `tests`, `components`).

filesReplacements.description: Swap one file icon for another - typically used to opt into '-alt' variants. Keys and values may use either hyphens or underscores (`rust-alt` and `rust_alt` are equivalent). Both icons must exist as SVGs in each palette folder.

foldersReplacements.description: Swap one folder icon for another. Keys are the icon's base name without the `folder_` prefix (e.g. `components`, not `folder_components`). Both icons must exist as `folder_<name>{,_open}.svg` in each palette folder.

filesAssociations.description: Map a file extension or filename to a specific icon. Compatible with Material Icon Theme syntax: `*.ext` for extensions, plain text for exact filenames, `dir/...` for paths inside a folder. Set the value to an empty string to remove an existing association.

foldersAssociations.description: Map a folder name to a specific icon. The value is the folder icon's base name (without the `folder_` prefix). Set the value to an empty string to remove an existing association.

youColors.description: Custom color palette for the **Flow You** icon theme. Top-level keys define dark-mode colors. Add a `light` sub-object to override light-mode colors (otherwise light is auto-derived by darkening each dark-mode color). Any key you omit falls back to the default monochromatic slate palette. See https://github.com/thang-nm/Flow-Icons/tree/main/you for sample palettes.

border.description: Optional border outline color. Defaults to `contrast` (which itself defaults to `white` in dark mode).

contrast.description: Optional contrast color. Defaults to `white` in dark mode.

borderOpacity.description: Border opacity (0-1). Set to 0 to hide borders entirely.

light.description: Light-mode overrides. Any key you set here wins over the auto-derived darken() value.
